title: Hydropark IPC message (Rust core ↔ Angular webview, protocol hydropark.ipc/1)
description: Discriminated union (on `type`) of every message crossing the Tauri webview/core boundary in Phase 1. Prose contract: ipc-contract.md. Command requests and all events are enveloped, self-describing messages validated here; a void command result resolves `undefined` and is not an enveloped message. Per-skill payload shapes (tool `args`, slot `value`, widget `props`) are validated at runtime against JSON Schemas shipped inside each signed .hpskill — this schema types the transport, not those payloads.

slotName.description: Shared-state slot name; routing is keyed on this (SPEC §9.3).

toolName.description: Runtime tool name; optional `skill.` namespace prefix on config collisions (SPEC §8.3.3).

widgetType.description: The fixed first-party widget library v1 (SPEC §9.4). chart/sparkline/map are Phase 2.

cmdError.description: The reject value of a command promise.

hardwareProfile.description: Read-only; never gates a feature (SPEC §2 responsibility split).

ingredientItem.description: The app-defined `item` record (SPEC §8.3.4). `id` is app-assigned on insert and makes cross-skill append/patch commutative.

routingDirective.description: How a tool result reaches the UI (SPEC §9.3 last ¶). writes_state → state; else updates_widget → widget; else chat.

toolContractEntry.description: One entry of the merged tool contract (SPEC §8.3.3).

slotDecl.description: One shared-state slot in the merged store (SPEC §8.3.4). Exactly one writer_of_record.

panelContract.description: A canonical (shorthand already normalized, SPEC §9.2) widget contract in the resolved dock.

props.description: Type-specific props; validated against the widget-type schema at load.

placeholder.description: true → an unknown/too-new widget rendered as a graceful placeholder (SPEC §9.8).

working_reserve_tokens.description: Fixed reserve so live chat history always has room.

used_tokens.description: Σ(primary full prompt, each secondary compressed prompt, tool schemas, few-shot).

action.description: Set when the core condensed old history rather than auto-disabling a skill (SPEC §8.3.5).

mergeResultBody.description: Deterministic Orchestrator output: primary → combine_priority desc → id asc (SPEC §8.3.2).

primary.description: Lead voice. No prompt text (paid IP; never crosses IPC).

oneOf.description: No active skill is primary_eligible → base agent leads (SPEC §8.3.1).

envelope.description: Common fields on every enveloped message. Individual messages pin `type`/`channel` to a const and add their own fields.

ipc_ready.description: core→UI, exactly once at startup before any agent message.

ipc_error.description: core→UI transport/protocol-level error (not tied to a request_id).

agent_composed.description: core→UI event and the agent/compose command result (channel may be event or response). Authoritative MergeResult; supersedes any prior for this agent.

agent_compose_blocked.description: core→UI (or command reject payload). Terminal for the compose attempt; carries a remedy.

bus_capacity.description: core→UI. Re-emitted as the conversation grows; ordered by seq per agent; latest wins.

agent_dispose.description: UI→core. Idempotent; disposing an unknown agent is a no-op success.

inference_start.description: UI→core. One in-flight turn per session; else rejects turn_in_flight.

inference_start_response.description: core→UI result of inference/start: the turn_id correlating this turn's stream.

inference_cancel.description: UI→core. Cooperative; idempotent (no-op on a finished/absent turn). Turn ends with done/finish_reason=cancelled.

inference_token.description: core→UI. seq is 0-based, contiguous per (session_id,turn_id); dedupe by seq; a gap is unrecoverable.

inference_tool_call.description: core→UI. Core already parsed + decided validity of a model <tool_call>; render-only. hop is 0-based within the turn.

inference_tool_result.description: core→UI. Follows a valid inference/tool_call; core already executed it. Carries the same RoutingDirective as UI-path results.

inference_tool_fallback.description: core→UI. Emitted only after validate→repair→fallback is exhausted (SPEC §8.4). Webview degrades to exactly one of: prefill updates_widget, or post clarifying_question. Never re-validates, never loops.

inference_done.description: core→UI. Terminal for a turn; exactly one (mutually exclusive with inference/error).

inference_error.description: core→UI. Terminal for a turn (mutually exclusive with inference/done).

tool_call.description: UI→core. The UI-first path (source=ui): core executes directly, no model round-trip. Idempotent by request_id. args validated in-core vs the skill-shipped JSON Schema.

tool_call_response.description: core→UI result of tool/call. ok=true carries result (+ routing); ok=false carries a structured error the model must acknowledge.

bus_state_snapshot.description: core→UI. Full slot value; sent on compose, on (re)subscribe, and to recover from stale_version. Idempotent (version-stamped).

bus_state_patch.description: core→UI. Delta on one slot. Apply iff base_version==local (else request a snapshot). version=base_version+1. Every widget with binds_state on this slot re-renders.

entries.description: list/record ops, keyed by entry id (append/patch/remove).

bus_state_write.description: UI→core. Two-way widget→slot write (SPEC §9.3 dir 1). Rejected not_writer_of_record unless the widget's skill owns the slot; stale_version on optimistic-concurrency miss. Idempotent by request_id.

bus_state_write_response.description: core→UI result of bus/state_write: the new slot version.

bus_event.description: UI→core. Direction 4 (SPEC §9.3 #4). NEVER triggers inference; appends a to_chat system line and (if time_critical) fires the OS notification. Idempotent by request_id.

bus_transcript_append.description: core→UI. The core-appended to_chat system line to render (from a widget event or a core-side event like a finished timer). Ordered after its cause. Does NOT run inference.

timer_control.description: UI→core. UI-first only; never model-callable. Idempotent by request_id.

timer_control_response.description: core→UI result of timer/control: the full (idempotent) TimerSnapshot.

timer_tick.description: core→UI ~1Hz. Lossy-tolerant: carries absolute remaining_sec, so a dropped tick self-heals.

timer_updated.description: core→UI. Full state; idempotent; supersedes ticks; emitted on any control action.

timer_finished.description: core→UI. Fires OS notification + sound even when backgrounded (SPEC §9.7). Exactly once per completion; also drives a bus/transcript_append.

skill_install.description: UI→core. Core verifies the Ed25519 signature OFFLINE before install; rejects signature_invalid. Idempotent (re-install of same sha256 is a no-op).

skill_install_response.description: core→UI. Public manifest projection only — NEVER the full system_prompt (paid IP; BACKEND-DESIGN §3.2/§4.2).

skill_enable.description: UI→core. Rejects skill_locked for an unentitled paid skill. Enable/disable re-run the Orchestrator (fresh agent/composed).

notify.description: UI→core. Best-effort OS notification; degrades to in-app alert if permission denied (SPEC §9.7). Not idempotent.

telemetry_log.description: UI→core append-only JSONL sink. Core validates schema_version and appends. Deliberately OPEN (unevaluatedProperties omitted) so new event fields need no lockstep release; keyed (session_id, ts_ms, event).

hardware_profile.description: UI→core, read-only. Never gates a feature (informs the capacity meter only). Idempotent.

hardware_profile_response.description: core→UI result of hardware/profile. Fields inlined (not allOf hardwareProfile) because that def is closed with additionalProperties:false and would reject the envelope fields.
